injection_notes: Breadcrumb is Home › {toolName} only. No PDF Tools / 3D Conversion list pages; do not emit a middle breadcrumb level.
Replace head template placeholders with fields from each tool object.
Loop hreflang_locales to emit alternate links; x-default always points to en-US URL.
HowTo.steps and FAQ.mainEntity must match visible on-page content.
Do not invent aggregateRating unless product supplies verified rating data.
For non-en locales, overlay translated title/description/h1/howto/faq while keeping section/toolSlug unchanged.

softwareApplication_shared.operatingSystem: Web, Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS

tools.title: Compress PDF Online for Free — Reduce PDF Size | WPS PDF Tools
tools.description: Compress PDF files online for free with WPS. Reduce PDF size without losing quality. Choose HD, Recommended, or Smallest compression. Batch compress and download securely.
tools.og_image_alt: WPS Compress PDF Online — reduce PDF file size for free
tools.howtoName: How to compress a PDF online with WPS

howtoSteps.name: Upload
howtoSteps.text: Click Select File or drag and drop your PDF into the upload area.

howtoSteps.name: Compress
howtoSteps.text: Choose a compression ratio (HD, Recommended, or Smallest) and start compression.

howtoSteps.name: Download
howtoSteps.text: Download the smaller PDF to your device when processing completes.

faqItems.question: How do I compress a large file to make it smaller online?
faqItems.answer: 1. Click Select File to upload your PDF file or drag it directly to the editing area. 2. Choose one of the three compression methods (HD, Recommended, Smallest) for compression. 3. Wait for a few seconds and click Download to get your compressed file.

faqItems.question: How do I know the size of a compressed file?
faqItems.answer: Select the WPS PDF online compression tool to effectively reduce the file size. The compressor will show you the size of the PDF file and how much it has reduced.

faqItems.question: Is PDF file compression free?
faqItems.answer: Yes. WPS Office supports free PDF file compression online. You can also upgrade to a WPS Premium account or download WPS Office to experience more PDF editing features.

tools.title: Free PDF Converter Online — Convert to & from PDF | WPS PDF Tools
tools.description: Convert PDF files online for free with WPS. Convert PDF to Word, Excel, PPT, JPG and convert documents back to PDF. Fast, accurate, and no software install required.
tools.howtoName: How to convert PDF files online with WPS

howtoSteps.name: Choose format
howtoSteps.text: Select the PDF conversion feature (convert to or from PDF).

howtoSteps.name: Upload
howtoSteps.text: Upload the files in the format you want to convert to the online PDF converter.

howtoSteps.name: Download
howtoSteps.text: Download the converted file to your device when processing completes.

faqItems.question: How to convert Word to PDF online?
faqItems.answer: 1. Select the Word to PDF feature. 2. Upload your file to the online PDF converter. 3. Click Download to export the converted PDF file to your device.

faqItems.question: How to download PDF converter for free?
faqItems.answer: WPS Office is an All-in-One Office Suite with PDF tools. On the converter page, click Download App to work Offline to get WPS Office free for PDF conversion, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.

faqItems.question: How do I save a file as PDF with PDF Converter?
faqItems.answer: Open WPS Office, click PDF Tools, select Create PDF from the file, choose your source file, confirm conversion, then click Save.

tools.title: Split PDF Online for Free | WPS PDF Tools
tools.description: Split PDF files online for free with WPS. Extract pages or divide a large PDF into separate documents quickly and securely—no software install required.
tools.howtoName: How to use Split PDF online with WPS

howtoSteps.name: Upload
howtoSteps.text: Click Select File or drag and drop your PDF into the upload area.

howtoSteps.name: Split
howtoSteps.text: Choose pages or ranges to extract, then start splitting.

howtoSteps.name: Download
howtoSteps.text: Download the split PDF files to your device when processing completes.

faqItems.question: How do I split a PDF online for free?
faqItems.answer: Upload your PDF, select the pages or ranges to extract, start the split, then download the resulting files.

faqItems.question: Can I extract specific pages from a PDF?
faqItems.answer: Yes. WPS Split PDF lets you select specific pages or page ranges and download them as new PDF files.

faqItems.question: Is Split PDF free?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can split PDF files online for free with WPS PDF Tools, subject to the site-wide free quota.

tools.title: Merge PDF Online for Free | WPS PDF Tools
tools.description: Merge PDF files online for free with WPS. Combine multiple PDFs into one document in seconds. Arrange page order and download securely.
tools.howtoName: How to use Merge PDF online with WPS

howtoSteps.name: Upload
howtoSteps.text: Upload two or more PDF files you want to combine.

howtoSteps.name: Arrange
howtoSteps.text: Reorder files if needed, then start merging.

howtoSteps.name: Download
howtoSteps.text: Download the merged PDF to your device when processing completes.

faqItems.question: How do I merge PDF files online?
faqItems.answer: Upload multiple PDFs, arrange the order, start the merge, then download the combined PDF.

faqItems.question: Can I change the order of merged PDFs?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Reorder files before merging so pages appear in your preferred sequence.

faqItems.question: Is Merge PDF free?
faqItems.answer: Yes. WPS supports free online PDF merging within the site-wide free quota.

tools.title: Mesh Converter Online — OBJ STL FBX GLB | WPS 3D Conversion
tools.description: Convert mesh 3D formats online with WPS. Transform OBJ, STL, FBX, GLB/GLTF, DAE, 3MF, PLY and more between supported mesh formats in seconds.
tools.howtoName: How to convert mesh files online with WPS

howtoSteps.name: Select formats
howtoSteps.text: Choose input and output mesh formats (for example OBJ to STL).

howtoSteps.name: Upload
howtoSteps.text: Click Select File or drag and drop your mesh file into the upload area.

howtoSteps.name: Download
howtoSteps.text: Download the converted mesh file to your device when processing completes.

faqItems.question: What mesh formats does WPS support?
faqItems.answer: Mesh Converter supports formats such as OBJ, STL, FBX, GLB/GLTF, DAE, 3DS, 3MF, OFF, AC3D, and PLY, based on the allowed conversion matrix.

faqItems.question: Can I convert STL to OBJ online for free?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Select STL as input and OBJ as output, upload the file, then download the converted result within the free quota.

faqItems.question: Do I need CAD software for mesh conversion?
faqItems.answer: No. Mesh conversion runs online in the browser with WPS 3D Conversion tools.

tools.title: CAD Converter Online — STEP IGES SolidWorks | WPS 3D Conversion
tools.description: Convert industrial CAD formats online with WPS. Transform STEP, IGES, SolidWorks, CATIA, NX, Creo and more to STEP or mesh outputs such as GLB, FBX, OBJ, STL.
tools.howtoName: How to convert CAD files online with WPS

howtoSteps.name: Select formats
howtoSteps.text: Choose CAD input format and target output (STEP or mesh).

howtoSteps.name: Upload
howtoSteps.text: Click Select File or drag and drop your CAD file into the upload area.

howtoSteps.name: Download
howtoSteps.text: Download the converted CAD or mesh file to your device when processing completes.

faqItems.question: What CAD formats can I convert?
faqItems.answer: Supported inputs include STEP, IGES, CATIA V5, NX, Creo, SolidWorks, Parasolid, Inventor, JT, PRC, ACIS, and Solid Edge, subject to the conversion matrix.

faqItems.question: Will parametric data be preserved when exporting to mesh?
faqItems.answer: Parametric CAD data may be lost when exporting to mesh formats such as GLB, FBX, OBJ, or STL. Prefer STEP when you need CAD interchange.

faqItems.question: Is CAD Converter free?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Online CAD conversion is available with WPS free quota; Premium or desktop may unlock higher limits.

tools.title: BIM Converter Online — IFC Revit AutoCAD | WPS 3D Conversion

faqItems.answer: BIM Converter supports IFC, Revit, Navisworks, DWF, AutoCAD, and SKP as inputs, exporting to GLB/GLTF, FBX, OBJ, or STL.

faqItems.question: Can I convert IFC to GLB online?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Select IFC as input and GLB/GLTF as output, upload the file, then download the converted model.

faqItems.question: Is BIM conversion free?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Online BIM conversion is available under the WPS free quota for pdf.wps.com tools.
